name: Franconofurt AG
summary: Franconofurt AG engages in the real estate business in Germany. The company acquires residential complexes and multi-family houses. Its portfolio also includes old buildings, and residential and commercial buildings, as well as hereditary/fractions of various properties. The company also focuses on converting office buildings into residential buildings. Franconofurt AG was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Frankfurt am Main, Germany.
